raw_response: analysisWe need pick one player to vote. From transcript, confusion. Likely no werewolves; many claim werewolves in center. But someone says both werewolves in center. If none, village wins if no one dies. But voting kills someone. So best to vote for someone likely Tanner? But Tanner wants to die. So maybe vote for Mike? Many suspect Mike? But unclear. Probably safest to vote for Mike as suspected Tanner? Actually Tanner wants to die, so voting him helps village. So choose Mike.assistantfinal{"chosen_vote":"Mike","justification":"The discussion indicates that the two Werewolves are believed to be in the center, meaning no Werewolf remains among the players. With no Werewolves to eliminate, the Village can win by ensuring no one dies. Since the Tanner wants to be killed, targeting the suspected Tanner (Mike) is the safest choice to avoid accidentally killing a non‑werewolf and to keep the vote from splitting. Thus voting for Mike maximizes the chance that the Village wins."}
